forbidden_scope: hosted browser, real VNC/noVNC transport, full remote console, or multi-user collaboration
account, secret, cookie, token, credential, or production payload handling
Core, Lode, or App repository changes
detailed handoff pause/lock state machine or task outcome/reconciliation logic
merge or issue closeout before hosted gate success

integration_evidence.summary: Adds process-local Viewer/control facts, opaque viewer refs, handoff owner records, Core runtime facts, and App runtime status fixture conversion.
Wires Viewer/control facts into Runtime Session creation, handoff updates, close lifecycle, and public Core/App readback methods.
Fixture and local-browser smoke now emit viewer/control, Core runtime, and App status facts alongside Runtime Session and page-scene refs.
Covers viewer ref and unavailable state, handoff owner changes, Core/App shared facts, endpoint exclusion, and closed-session fixture state.
Binds the implementation to GH-97 and records coverage for #87 and #98-#100.
Maps GH-97 behavior evidence, validation evidence, and fresh verification input to the working tree before PR creation.

commands.notes: 8 node:test checks passed after adding viewer/control/Core-App facts coverage.
Fixture smoke produced Runtime Session, Snapshot/RefMap/Evidence refs, Viewer/control facts, Core runtime facts, App status fixture, and close facts.
Local Chrome/149.0.7827.201 launched with a temporary dedicated profile and produced the same ref-only Viewer/control/Core-App facts without real accounts or production payloads.
Host issue signals remain tracking-only; Work Item truth stays with GH-97 progress/work-item carriers.

First run after status switch blocked because bootstrap fact-chain entry points still referenced GH-92 and progress Evidence Freshness used non-contract free text; both were corrected and rerun passed at 2026-07-01T17:56:36Z.

Classified as tool path / CLI consumption gap: installed Loom build flow searches repo-local tools/loom.py for suite JSON consumption. Global `loom suite validate`, `loom suite carrier validate`, `loom suite evidence validate`, and `loom fact-chain` passed for GH-97, so this does not indicate product implementation failure.

validation.recheck_condition: Run hosted gate after PR creation or every push; require broader suite if persistent storage, public schema/SDK/OpenAPI, raw viewer/control endpoints, Core/App repository changes, real account state, remote browser support, or complete handoff state machine behavior is added.
